title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 74.
content:
There was an Old Man of Whitehaven,
    Who danced a quadrille with a Raven;
    But they said - "It's absurd,
    To encourage this bird!"
    So they smashed that Old Man of Whitehaven.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 74."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
